_comment: IN-BUNDLE manifest. This file lives at the root of hxtest-1.0.0.hxapp (a zip) and is validated by case_service.marketplace.checksum.parse_and_validate_manifest at download + promotion time. A module .hxapp carries NO executable backend code — the HxTest Python ships in the Velaris image (the trust model forbids loading in-process code from a package). Install only flips the in-image routes/UI on per tenant via marketplace_installs. The bundle is metadata (+ optional bundled DSL tests for Phase F).
name: HxTest
description: AI test layer for Velaris, built on the inbuilt Test Suite.
